name: Agent Change Control
description: Creates ITIL-compliant Change Requests for agent lifecycle events with risk scoring, CAB notification, and post-implementation review scheduling. Enforces NIST CM-3.

triggers.description: Activates when user mentions agent deployment, update, blocking, or lifecycle change events
Triggered when an agent package is deployed, updated, or blocked in the tenant

actions.name: create-agent-change-request
actions.description: Create an ITIL-compliant change request for an agent lifecycle event

inputs.name: changeType
inputs.description: Event type: deploy, update, block, rollback, decommission

actions.name: assess-agent-change-risk
actions.description: Calculate risk score for an agent lifecycle change based on NIST CM-3 and organizational policy

outputs.name: riskAssessment
outputs.description: Risk score, factors, and recommended change type (standard/normal/emergency)

crossPracticeIntegrations.description: Creates change requests in the ITSM change process
Agent inventory provides package metadata for risk assessment

hitlControls.reason: All agent lifecycle changes require formal change request approval
Blocking an agent requires ECAB authorization

knowledgeSources.description: Agent packages from Package Management API
AGP-001 organizational policy for agent governance
